files.content: --- import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" interface Props extends HTMLAttributes<"div"> {} const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props ---

---
import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

interface Props extends HTMLAttributes<"details"> {}

const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props
---

<details
  data-slot="accordion-item"
  class={cn(
    "not-last:border-b",
    "group/accordion-item",
    "details-content:h-0 open:details-content:h-auto",
    "details-content:ease-out",
    "details-content:duration-200",
    "details-content:overflow-hidden",
    "details-content:transition-discrete",
    "details-content:transition-[height,content-visibility]",
    className
  )}
  {...props}
>
  <slot />
</details>

---
import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types"
import ChevronDownIcon from "lucide-static/icons/chevron-down.svg"
import ChevronUpIcon from "lucide-static/icons/chevron-up.svg"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

interface Props extends HTMLAttributes<"summary"> {}

const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props
---

<summary
  data-slot="accordion-trigger"
  class={cn(
    "list-none [&::-webkit-details-marker]:hidden",
    "focus-visible:ring-ring/50 focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:after:border-ring **:data-[slot=accordion-trigger-icon]:text-muted-foreground relative flex flex-1 items-start justify-between rounded-md border border-transparent py-4 text-left text-sm font-medium transition-all outline-none hover:underline focus-visible:ring-3 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50",
    className
  )}
  {...props}
>
  <slot />
  <ChevronDownIcon
    data-slot="accordion-trigger-icon"
    class="pointer-events-none ml-auto size-4 shrink-0 group-open/accordion-item:hidden"
  />
  <ChevronUpIcon
    data-slot="accordion-trigger-icon"
    class="pointer-events-none ml-auto hidden size-4 shrink-0 group-open/accordion-item:inline"
  />
</summary>

export { default as Accordion } from "./accordion.astro"
export { default as AccordionContent } from "./accordion-content.astro"
export { default as AccordionItem } from "./accordion-item.astro"
export { default as AccordionTrigger } from "./accordion-trigger.astro"
